mapper.sql: id, user_id, supplier_id, product_id, quantity, support_installation, selected, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_cart_items (user_id, supplier_id, product_id, quantity, support_installation, selected, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{supportInstallation, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{selected, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

INSERT INTO client_cart_items (user_id, supplier_id, product_id, quantity, support_installation, selected, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.supplierId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.quantity, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.supportInstallation, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.selected, jdbcType=BOOLEAN}, #{item.status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM client_cart_items WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active'
SELECT FROM client_cart_items WHERE id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active'
SELECT FROM client_cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM client_cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND product_id = #{productId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM client_cart_items WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active'
mapper.update: UPDATE client_cart_items SET status = CONCAT('deleted_', id) WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active'
UPDATE client_cart_items SET status = CONCAT('deleted_', id) WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND status = 'active'
UPDATE client_cart_items SET status = CONCAT('deleted_', id) WHERE status = 'active' AND id IN #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
